<> To replace one URL with another in a string using PHP you can use the `str_replace` function. This function allows you to search for a specific string and replace it with another. Here is an example of how you can do it: ```php $string = "New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $old_url = "http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1"; $new_url = "http://yahoo.com/abc1"; $result = str_replace($old_url, $new_url, $string); echo $result; ``` This code will replace all occurrences of the old URL with the new URL in the given string. The function `str_replace` is ideal for this task as it handles repeated strings effectively. A palindrome is a word that reads the same forwards and backwards. An example of a palindrome is "madam". This string is the same when reversed, making it a perfect example of a palindrome.
